subject: Use released version of ESR
commit_message:
Use released version of ESR

Issue-ID: AAI-2734
Change-Id: I9479f62bfc1baab2d3a72602f6c6fa704ef01962
Signed-off-by: Forsyth, James (jf2512) <jf2512@att.com>

entries.message:

Patch Set 1:

Yes, but this shows that it fixes the bug, which is communication to AAI from ESR thru MSB - this 404 shows no data on the AAI node, which is the expected result unless a cloud region exists in AAI.  You'd need to add a cloud region to get a different result.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

Yes I was OK for the patch part fix, that's why I didn't put -1.
So let's merge
